name: Production Readiness of the Tonic Language

description: Baseline: 30 production readiness gaps (22 oversized files, 1 parity unchecked, 4 parity partial, 2 stdlib P1, 1 TODO)
refactor(c_backend): extract try/for/closure from stubs.rs into 3 files — stubs.rs 5256→3484, but added 2 new oversized files (stubs_try 562, stubs_for 778). Net +2 oversized files.
refactor(c_backend): split stubs.rs try/for/closure into modules, dedup c_string_literal in ops.rs, resolve TODO in manifest.rs. Fix gap counting to exclude PARITY.md legend.
feat(parser): add Block expression for sequential statements in do..end bodies. feat(stdlib): unify stdlib injection for single-file and project mode. Closes P1 stdlib gap.
feat(parser): extend block body support to if/unless/with/for/try bodies. Sequential statements now work in all major do..end contexts.
docs(stdlib): close remaining P1 gap — document binary text as intentional design decision. Both P1 stdlib gaps now resolved.
refactor(resolver_diag): add constructor helper to reduce boilerplate — 509→474 lines, under 500 limit.
